fields.ProductName: Helios Nolan Dresser with Mirror and Stool - Teak
fields.ProductDescription: This dresser mirror boasts a melamine finish on pre-laminated engineered wood made from compressed fibre boards with hardwood extracts, ensuring strength and reliable screw-holding. It includes a 3mm bevelled mirror situated at chest height for an optimal view, with smooth edges on all four corners. High-quality butterfly hinges, tested for performance and corrosion resistance, allow for easy realignment. The dresser also features 4 open shelves for makeup storage, 1 drawer, 1 cabinet, and a comfortable stool for added convenience.

Upgrade your storage with this 3-door wardrobe, designed for both style and functionality. Made from sturdy engineered wood with a melamine finish, it s resistant to scratches, stains, heat, and termites for long-lasting durability. PU-cladded finish lend a premium look, while 13 shelves, a hanger rod, two lockers, and a drawer provide ample space to organise your essentials.

fields.ProductName: Iris Sintered Stone Top 6-8 Seater Extendable Dining Table - Beige
fields.ProductDescription: Upgrade your dining space with this 6-seater extendable dining table, featuring a sintered stone tabletop and a high-gauge mild steel frame. Designed for everyday use, it offers exceptional durability, strength and a sleek modern look.

fields.ProductName: Lansbury NXT Fabric 2-Seater Sofa with Cushions - Beige
fields.ProductDescription: Experience relaxation with this elegantly designed 2-seater sofa. Made from pine wood and upholstered in anti-microbial polyester, it features a stable, lightweight structure. The HDR PU foam and softy foam offer a semi-soft seating experience with moderate resilience. This sofa comes with cushions for that added change.

This entertainment wall unit is the perfect blend of form and function for any modern living room. Made of engineered wood with a sleek melamine finish, it is designed to resist heat, scratches, and stains, enhancing both its appearance and durability. Featuring external drawers, open shelves, and a cabinet with additional shelves, it provides ample storage for multimedia devices and accessories. With its stylish ridge door and drawer fronts, this unit elevates the decor.

fields.ProductName: Helios Casper Faux Marble Top 4-Seater Dining Set with Chairs - Brown
fields.ProductDescription: Add a touch of modern elegance to your dining area with this stylish 4-seater dining set. The table boasts a faux marble top and durable rubber wood frame with laminated wooden panel legs, combining beauty and strength. Matching dining chairs feature soft polyester upholstery, medium back support, and sturdy construction, designed to comfortably support up to 110 kg. This set blends comfort, durability, and sophisticated design for every day dining.

fields.ProductName: Silas Vanilla Faux Leather 1-Seater Revolving Recliner with Footstool - Off-White
fields.ProductDescription: Get the style quotient of your living room soaring with this one-seater lounge recliner, complete with a footrest for enhanced comfort and posture. Upholstered in soft yet durable faux leather, it features a high backrest and a flat seat designed for optimum lumbar care. Crafted from resilient rubber wood, it offers 360-degree rotation and three reclining positions, perfect for sitting, reading, or watching TV.
